data.name: Taboo University Book One
data.detailed_description:
Taboo University is a thrilling and provocative adult visual novel that serves as a loose prequel to the legendary Fetish Locator trilogy. In this game, every choice you make shapes the story, and it’s up to you to decide how to play it—whether you rely on your wit, charm, or other skills.

You kick off your adventure at the prestigious ViNovella University, where you’re undercover as a freshman, diving headfirst into the mysterious disappearance of three girls. Your mission? Find them and figure out what really went down.

 

As you explore the buzzing campus of ViNovella, you’ll meet a whole cast of intriguing characters. From mysterious professors and alluring MILFs to seductive students—each with their own backstory and motives that you’ll need to uncover.

One of the standout features of Taboo University is the choice of factions you can join, letting you set your own narrative stage:

Choose Your Path:

🔮 The Cult - Mysticism:

  • If you’re drawn to the world of mysticism and the supernatural, The Cult faction will immerse you in the atmosphere of occult rituals and ancient secrets. Joining this mysterious brotherhood, you won’t just be a spectator—you’ll be an active participant in rituals filled with the unknown and forbidden. Picture this: ancient rituals around a fire, surrounded by entranced women, where the outcome of your investigation is tied not just to your actions but to the far-reaching influence of the faction that extends beyond the college walls.

🕵️ The Syndicate - Crime:

  • If you’re into the rougher, more dangerous side of things, The Syndicate opens the door to a world of underground fights, criminal wars, and power struggles. By aligning with this faction, you’ll step into a shadowy world where there are no rules except the ones you make. You’ll deal with risky transactions, clashes with rival gangs, and the constant adrenaline rush of staying one step ahead of the law. It’s a world where life and death decisions are made every day, and you’re in the thick of it.

🏐 The Winners Club - Sports and Competition:

  • If the spirit of competition and athletic achievement is more your style, then The Winners Club invites you to join the college volleyball team. But don’t be fooled—sports are just the tip of the iceberg. Behind the athletic success lies a life of wild parties, steamy locker room encounters, and dormitory drama. Discover that winning isn’t always about hard training and see what lengths you’ll go to in order to become a champion.

Choosing a faction not only sets the tone for your journey but also unlocks exclusive content, determining the challenges and adventures that lie ahead. Each faction offers its own story, with unique twists and temptations, making your gameplay experience truly one of a kind.

Key Features:

  • Shape Your Destiny: Every decision impacts your journey and relationships

  • Immersive Storyline: Unravel the disappearance of three girls at ViNovella University

  • Diverse Cast: Interact with intriguing professors, alluring MILFs, and seductive students

  • Multiple Factions: Join The Cult, The Syndicate, or Winners Club for unique experiences

  • High Replayability: Explore different paths and unlock multiple endings

Taboo University: Will you solve the mystery or succumb to temptation?

FAQ:

  • How long is the game?

    • Average playtime is 10-20 hours.

  • Are there in-game purchases?

    • No, all content is included with your purchase.

  • Will there be sequels?

    • Yes! We're already hard at work on Taboo University: Book 2.

  • Can I connect my Lovense toys?

    • Yes! The game is fully integrated with all Lovense toys.

data.short_description: Set before all the events of Fetish Locator, something strange happened and three girls went missing! Now you must immerse yourself in a prestigious university's depths to learn more about it. Meet new people, meet new sexy girls, and discover all the secrets hidden in this big university!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
